name: I'm with the Band: Nasty Cherry
original_name: I'm with the Band: Nasty Cherry
overview: In an unfiltered, intimate docuseries, pop star mentor Charli XCX finds out what it takes to build -- and break -- a real, badass all-girl punk band.
